findings.message: plugins/cad/skills/* is a byte-identical generated mirror of skills/*, confirming scripts/bundle/bundle-plugin.sh is up to date
Third-party Python dependencies across all requirements.txt files in the repo have no version constraint
Vercel deploy token is transmitted via Authorization header to Vercel's own API — correct, expected CI/CD usage
bambu-labs/SKILL.md does not define a required report shape despite being the highest-stakes (live-printer-control) skill in the repo
One vague quantifier ('relevant') without measurable criteria
TLS certificate verification is disabled by default for the printer's MQTT/FTPS sockets, mitigated by a private-host-only guard for LAN-only Bambu firmware self-signed certs
One vague quantifier ('relevant') without measurable criteria
gcode/SKILL.md does not define what the agent's final response must include
Two vague quantifiers ('appropriate', 'relevant') without measurable criteria
Two vague quantifiers ('relevant' x2) without measurable criteria
One vague quantifier ('relevant') without measurable criteria
Four vague quantifiers ('relevant' x2, 'as needed' x2) without measurable criteria
Two vague quantifiers ('relevant', 'when needed') without measurable criteria
Three vague quantifiers ('relevant' x3) without measurable criteria
Two vague quantifiers ('relevant', 'appropriate') without measurable criteria

gcode/SKILL.md does not define what the agent's final response must include — No 'final response should include' or 'required report shape' statement anywhere in the file, unlike sibling skills sdf/cad/dxf/srdf/urdf/step-parts which all state one
Two vague quantifiers ('appropriate', 'relevant') without measurable criteria — Line 41 contains 'appropriate'; line 63 contains 'relevant'

bambu-labs/SKILL.md does not define a required report shape despite being the highest-stakes (live-printer-control) skill in the repo — No 'final response should include' or 'required report shape' statement anywhere in the file, despite this skill controlling live 3D printer hardware
One vague quantifier ('relevant') without measurable criteria — Line 33 contains 'relevant'
Four vague quantifiers ('relevant' x2, 'as needed' x2) without measurable criteria — Lines 22, 36 contain 'relevant'; lines 39, 40 contain 'as needed'
Three vague quantifiers ('relevant' x3) without measurable criteria — Lines 14, 23, 31 all contain 'relevant'
Two vague quantifiers ('relevant', 'appropriate') without measurable criteria — Line 27 contains 'relevant'; line 38 contains 'appropriate'
Two vague quantifiers ('relevant', 'when needed') without measurable criteria — Line 26 contains 'relevant'; line 33 contains 'when needed'
Two vague quantifiers ('relevant' x2) without measurable criteria — Lines 136 and 140 both contain 'relevant'
One vague quantifier ('relevant') without measurable criteria — Line 37 contains 'relevant'
One vague quantifier ('relevant') without measurable criteria — Line 76 contains 'relevant'

TLS certificate verification is disabled by default for the printer's MQTT/FTPS sockets, mitigated by a private-host-only guard for LAN-only Bambu firmware self-signed certs — ssl.create_default_context() followed by check_hostname=False and verify_mode=ssl.CERT_NONE at lines 379-380 (repeats at 943-944, 1152-1153, 1210-1211); gated by validate_local_host() at line 329 which requires a private/loopback/link-local address per is_local_address() at line 308

Vercel deploy token is transmitted via Authorization header to Vercel's own API — correct, expected CI/CD usage — Line 83: curl --header "Authorization: Bearer $VERCEL_TOKEN" sent to https://api.vercel.com/v9/projects; VERCEL_TOKEN is read from environment at line 68

Third-party Python dependencies across all requirements.txt files in the repo have no version constraint — ezdxf, playwright, networkx, lxml, pytest, trimesh listed with zero version constraint across requirements-dev.txt and 15 sibling requirements.txt files

plugins/cad/skills/* is a byte-identical generated mirror of skills/*, confirming scripts/bundle/bundle-plugin.sh is up to date — diff on all 11 skills/<name>/SKILL.md vs plugins/cad/skills/<name>/SKILL.md pairs returned zero differences
